text: The app crashes frequently on startup. This has been happening for weeks and there's no fix in sight. I'm considering switching to a competitor.
author: user_1

text: Love the product overall but the mobile experience is lagging behind the desktop version. Please invest more in the mobile app.
author: user_2

text: Would really love a dark mode option. It's 2024 and most apps have this. My eyes hurt using this app at night.
author: user_3

text: Excellent customer support! They resolved my issue within 2 hours. The product itself is fantastic and worth every penny.
author: user_4

text: Performance has degraded significantly over the last month. Basic operations that used to be instant now take 5-10 seconds. Very frustrating.
author: user_5

text: Pricing is too high for the value offered. Competitors provide similar features at half the price. Cancelling next month.
author: user_6

text: The API documentation is outdated and missing key examples. Took me days to figure out basic integrations that should be documented.
author: user_7

text: Absolutely love this product. Has transformed my workflow completely. The team collaboration features are best-in-class.
author: user_8

text: Integration with Slack is broken since the last update. Our team relies on this integration for daily operations. Need an urgent fix.
author: user_9

text: Would love to see batch operations added. Right now I have to process items one by one which is incredibly tedious for large datasets.
author: user_10
